summary: Iteration 21: Comprehensive testing of Daily Report Normal/Detail mode upgrade. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All UI features verified - Normal/Detail toggle working correctly, Mill Parts Stock section visible with Parts Purchased/Used tables, PDF/Excel exports functioning with mode parameter.

2_normal_mode_simplified_tables.description: Normal mode shows simplified table columns

3_detail_mode_expanded_tables.description: Detail mode shows expanded table columns with additional fields
3_detail_mode_expanded_tables.paddy_columns: Truck, Agent, Mandi, RST, KG, Bags, Moisture%, Mill W, Final W
3_detail_mode_expanded_tables.cash_columns: Description, Party, Category, Type, Account, Amount

test_results.cash_table_expanded: PASS - 6 columns shown including Party and Category
test_results.private_payment_details_visible: PASS - Shows under Payments Summary in Detail mode

4_mill_parts_stock_section.description: Mill Parts Stock section in Daily Report with Parts In, Parts Used, Purchase Amount cards

test_results.parts_purchased_table: PASS - Shows Part, Qty, Rate, Party, Bill No, Amount columns
test_results.parts_used_table: PASS - Shows Part, Qty, Remark columns
test_results.data_correct: PASS - Belt: 5 purchased at ₹850 from ABC Spares, 2 used

test_results.detail_mode_returns_expanded: PASS - mode:'detail' in response with mandi, rst_no, moisture etc

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 tested Daily Report Normal/Detail mode upgrade. Normal mode shows 4-column tables (simplified), Detail mode shows 6-column tables (expanded) with Party, Category fields plus Private Payment Details section. Mill Parts Stock section shows Parts In/Used/Purchase Amount cards with Parts Purchased and Parts Used detail tables. All exports (PDF/Excel) work with mode parameter. Test data: Belt 5 in from ABC Spares at ₹850, 2 used. Bank Jama ₹50,000 from Shyam Traders rice payment.
